data.description: Nissan will keep its approach of developing and manufacturing products within China, the CEO says.

data.title: Peter Schiff Wants Investors To Ditch Bitcoin For Gold, Silver Which Could 'Start New Legs Up'
data.description: A prominent economist, Peter Schiff, suggested on Monday that individuals should consider exchanging their Bitcoin for gold and silver as the leading cryptocurrency approached the crucial $75,000 mark. Schiff reiterated his longstanding recommendation in a recent post, highlighting the proximity of Bitcoin to $75,000, a figure similar to the average price at which Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) acquired its Bitcoin stash. He pointed out the declining value of the U.S. dollar and the potential for gold and silver to see an uptrend. Advising followers to sell their Bitcoin and shift to gold and silver, Schiff emphasized the current market dynamics. Bitcoin's price nearing $75,000, a figure close to Michael Saylor's cost basis for MSTR, further supported Schiff's argument. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
Israeli media say negotiations with Lebanon today are intended to outline a general framework along with timelines.

data.title: DOJ offering aid for victims of $4B OneCoin scam led by Ignatova and Greenwood. Ignatova missing since '17, Greenwood faced 20-yr sentence.
data.description: La cryptocurrency known as OneCoin was established in Bulgaria by Ruja Ignatova and Karl Sebastian Greenwood. Ignatova disappeared in 2017 and Greenwood was convicted and is serving a 20-year prison sentence.

data.title: Omio launches in ChatGPT, bringing its real-time multimodal travel search to 900 million users
data.description: Accessing various transportation modes such as trains, buses, flights, and ferries is now possible through ChatGPT, integrating Omio's extensive transport network for AI users globally. On April 14, 2026, Omio, a top multimodal travel platform, revealed the introduction of this feature. The service ensures streamlined searchability for transportation options, enhancing convenience for travelers.

data.title: Analysts predict Bitcoin to dip to $50K, seen as last major buying zone before potential rebound.
data.description: With Bitcoin's drop to the $50,000 mark, LVRG Research's director Nick Ruck believes this to be the final major accumulation zone before a potential prolonged upturn.

data.title: Teledyne to Showcase Integrated Maritime Technology Portfolio at the 2026 IHO Assembly
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Inc. (NYSE: TDY) stated its involvement in the 2026 International Hydrographic Organization (IHO) Assembly in Monaco on April 19–23, 2026. The company's top maritime brands such as Teledyne CARIS, Raymarine Commercial, FLIR Marine, ChartWorld, SevenCs, and Teledyne Marine will showcase a collection of technologies enhancing marine navigation and hydrography at the event.

data.title: SES, Japan Airlines to Expand Multi-Orbit Inflight Connectivity to Long-Haul Fleet
data.description: Luxembourg-based SES, a prominent space solutions company, revealed today that Japan Airlines (JAL) has chosen them to provide advanced multi-orbit inflight connectivity (IFC) for their long-haul fleet of Airbus and Boeing aircraft. This move aligns with JAL's dedication to offering passengers a superior onboard experience, ensuring fast and reliable internet access while flying. As part of the deal, JAL will equip 20 Airbus A350-900 aircraft with SES's cutting-edge multi-orbit electronically steered antenna (ESA) system.

data.title: Novo Nordisk and OpenAI partner to transform how medicines are discovered and delivered
data.description: On April 14, 2026, Novo Nordisk, a Denmark-based company, revealed a significant collaboration with OpenAI. This partnership signifies Novo Nordisk's commitment to leading the way in AI-driven changes within healthcare. By teaming up with OpenAI, Novo Nordisk aims to expedite the development of improved treatment solutions for patients.
